---
title: "Contact & References"
subtitle: "Reach out, connect, or ask for a referee."
pagetitle: "Contact - Sritanya Suresh Andal"
description: "Contact details and professional references for Sritanya Suresh Andal."
toc: true
toc-depth: 2
---

[The short version]{.kicker}

::: {.lede}
The best way to reach me is email - I answer within a day or two. For professional conversations, LinkedIn works equally well.
:::

## Get in touch

::: {.grid}
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### Direct

- {{< fa regular envelope >}} [sritanyaandalsuresh@gmail.com](mailto:sritanyaandalsuresh@gmail.com)
- {{< fa solid phone >}} [+353 89 658 8235](tel:+353896588235)
- {{< fa solid location-dot >}} Dublin, Ireland
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### Online

- {{< fa brands linkedin >}} [linkedin.com/in/sritanyasureshandal](https://www.linkedin.com/in/sritanyasureshandal){target="_blank"}
- {{< fa brands github >}} [GitHub](https://github.com/sritanya-sureshandal){target="_blank"}
- {{< fa regular file-lines >}} [Download my CV (PDF)](cv/SritanyaSureshAndal_CV.pdf){target="_blank"}
:::
:::

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple" icon=false}
**If you are a recruiter or hiring manager:** I am open to internship and graduate-role conversations in analytics, data science, and product/strategy-adjacent work in the UK and Ireland. Happy to share my CV, a longer portfolio walkthrough, or references on request.
:::

## What I respond to best

A short message that tells me:

1. Who you are and what you are working on.
2. Why you think this might be a fit (or why you are curious).
3. One concrete thing you'd like to discuss or ask.

Short beats polished. I will always write back.

## Professional references

Available on request. If you need a referee, email me with the role you are considering and I will loop in the most relevant of the following, along with an introduction:

| Referee | Context | Availability |
|---|---|---|
| Academic supervisor, DCU Business School | MSc Business Analytics - coursework and project work across data management, strategy, and ML modules. | On request |
| Faculty advisor, Stella Maris College | Bachelor's programme and Students' Union Vice-Presidency - leadership, organisational, and project management work. | On request |
| Former mentor, Stella Maris Photography & Film-making Club | Operations, team management, and creative direction. | On request |

: Referee availability {.striped .hover tbl-colwidths="[32,52,16]"}

::: {.callout-important appearance="simple" icon=false}
**A note on privacy:** I list referees by role rather than name here so that my referees are not contacted cold. Please email me first, and I will make a warm introduction.
:::

## Response expectations

I am a student and I try to keep a healthy boundary around response times. In practice:

- **Email** - within 24–48 hours on weekdays.
- **LinkedIn DMs** - a few days, sometimes up to a week.
- **Time-sensitive** - include a deadline in the subject line and I will prioritise.

Thanks for reading this far. I am looking forward to the conversation.

---

::: {style="text-align: center; margin-top: 2.5rem;"}
[Made with care in Dublin · [source repo](https://github.com/sritanya-sureshandal){target="_blank"}]{.kicker}
:::
